suite.name: Test1 Echo Raw

kw.name: KW: Environment Specific
kw.doc: Condition where all host are stored in one place based on the env it will get executed.

kw.name: Run Keyword
kw.doc: Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: KW: UAT host url's
kw.doc: UAT environment host urls.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
kw.msg: ${ws host url} = wss://ws.postman-echo.com

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
kw.msg: ${api host url} = https://postman-echo.com

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${ws host url} = wss://ws.postman-echo.com

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${api host url} = https://postman-echo.com

kw.name: Run Keyword
kw.doc: Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Exception! the current environment "${environment}" is not functionable.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Finally! the current environment "${environment}" is functionable.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: Finally! the current environment "uat" is functionable.

test.name: TC1: WS Connect, set timeout, get timeout, assert timeout and close the socket.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Connect
kw.doc: Create a WebSocket session to a server. With an alias, where Robot Framework alias is to identify the session. Ex: wss://ws.postman-echo.com/raw header=["User-Agent: MyProgram","x-custom: header"]

kw.name: Connect
kw.msg: ${websocket session_name} = <websocket._core.WebSocket object at 0x10f510250>

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${websocket session_name} = <websocket._core.WebSocket object at 0x10f510250>

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Settimeout
kw.doc: Set the timeout of the Websocket server req.

kw.name: Convert To Integer
kw.doc: Converts the given item to an integer number.
kw.msg: ${timeout_conversion_to_integer} = 60

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Gettimeout
kw.doc: Get the timeout of the Websocket server req.

kw.name: Gettimeout
kw.msg: ${ws gettimeout} = 60

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${ws gettimeout} = 60

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.
kw.msg: ${gettimeout converted to string} = 60

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${gettimeout converted to string} = 60

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocket BulitIn Response Assertion
kw.doc: Close the websocket server With Reason.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Close
kw.doc: Close the opened WebSocket session to a server.

test.doc: This TC is to Connect, set timeout, get timeout, assert timeout and close the socket.

test.name: TC2: WS Connect, get header, status & assert status, header and close the socket with reason.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Connect
kw.doc: Create a WebSocket session to a server. With an alias, where Robot Framework alias is to identify the session. Ex: wss://ws.postman-echo.com/raw header=["User-Agent: MyProgram","x-custom: header"]

kw.name: Connect
kw.msg: ${websocket session_name} = <websocket._core.WebSocket object at 0x10f510e90>

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${websocket session_name} = <websocket._core.WebSocket object at 0x10f510e90>

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Getheaders
kw.doc: Get the headers of the Websocket server req.

kw.name: Getheaders
kw.msg: ${ws get headers} = {'date': 'Thu, 19 Oct 2023 17:27:01 GMT', 'connection': 'upgrade', 'server': 'nginx', 'upgrade': 'websocket', 'sec-websocket-accept': '7aVggRQEINrC0p7Qca742pX6/94=', 'origin': 'https://ws.postman-echo...

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${ws get headers} = {'date': 'Thu, 19 Oct 2023 17:27:01 GMT', 'connection': 'upgrade', 'server': 'nginx', 'upgrade': 'websocket', 'sec-websocket-accept': '7aVggRQEINrC0p7Qca742pX6/94=', 'origin': 'https://ws.postman-echo...

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Getstatus
kw.doc: Get the status of the Websocket server req.

kw.name: Getstatus
kw.msg: ${ws get status} = 101

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${ws get status} = 101

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.
kw.msg: ${getstatus converted to string} = 101

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${getstatus converted to string} = 101

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocket BulitIn Response Assertion
kw.doc: Close the websocket server With Reason.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Close With Reason
kw.doc: Close the websocket server With Reason.

test.doc: This TC is to Connect, get header, status & assert status, header and close the socket with reason.

test.name: TC3: WS Connect, send text, receive & assert the recieve text and close the socket with reason.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Connect
kw.doc: Create a WebSocket session to a server. With an alias, where Robot Framework alias is to identify the session. Ex: wss://ws.postman-echo.com/raw header=["User-Agent: MyProgram","x-custom: header"]

kw.msg: ${websocket session_name} = <websocket._core.WebSocket object at 0x10f528c10>

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${websocket session_name} = <websocket._core.WebSocket object at 0x10f528c10>

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Send
kw.doc: Send the message from the Websocket server.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Recv
kw.doc: Receive the message from the Websocket server.

kw.name: Recv
kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = all is well

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = all is well

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.
kw.msg: ${receive results converted to string} = all is well

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${receive results converted to string} = all is well

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocket BulitIn Response Assertion
kw.doc: Close the websocket server With Reason.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Close With Reason
kw.doc: Close the websocket server With Reason.

test.doc: This TC is to Connect, send text, receive & assert the recieve text and close the socket with reason.

test.name: TC4: WS Connect, send binary text, ping and close the socket with reason.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Connect
kw.doc: Create a WebSocket session to a server. With an alias, where Robot Framework alias is to identify the session. Ex: wss://ws.postman-echo.com/raw header=["User-Agent: MyProgram","x-custom: header"]

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Send Binary
kw.doc: Send the message from the Websocket server.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Ping
kw.doc: Ping the Websocket server with Payload.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Close With Reason
kw.doc: Close the websocket server With Reason.

test.doc: This TC is to Connect, send binary text, ping and close the socket with reason.

test.name: TC5: WS Connect websocket to null resrve keyword end point.
test.doc: This TC is to Connect, send text, receive & assert the recieve text and close the socket with reason.
test.status: Test skipped using '--skip' command line option.

suite.doc: This robot file will execute only the raw cases.

suite.name: Test2 Echo Raw Queryparams

kw.name: KW: Environment Specific
kw.doc: Condition where all host are stored in one place based on the env it will get executed.

kw.name: Run Keyword
kw.doc: Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: KW: UAT host url's
kw.doc: UAT environment host urls.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
kw.msg: ${ws host url} = wss://ws.postman-echo.com

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
kw.msg: ${api host url} = https://postman-echo.com

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${ws host url} = wss://ws.postman-echo.com

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${api host url} = https://postman-echo.com

kw.name: Run Keyword
kw.doc: Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Exception! the current environment "${environment}" is not functionable.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Finally! the current environment "${environment}" is functionable.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: Finally! the current environment "uat" is functionable.

test.name: TC1: WS Connect, send the query parameter, assert the viowel reply and close the socket.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Connect
kw.doc: Create a WebSocket session to a server. With an alias, where Robot Framework alias is to identify the session. Ex: wss://ws.postman-echo.com/raw header=["User-Agent: MyProgram","x-custom: header"]

kw.name: Connect
kw.msg: ${websocket session_name} = <websocket._core.WebSocket object at 0x10f4fefd0>

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${websocket session_name} = <websocket._core.WebSocket object at 0x10f4fefd0>

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Send
kw.doc: Send the message from the Websocket server.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Recv
kw.doc: Receive the message from the Websocket server.

kw.name: Recv
kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = Configuration Successful!! Server has started 🎉🎉🎉🎉

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = Configuration Successful!! Server has started 🎉🎉🎉🎉

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.
kw.msg: ${receive results converted to string} = Configuration Successful!! Server has started 🎉🎉🎉🎉

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${receive results converted to string} = Configuration Successful!! Server has started 🎉🎉🎉🎉

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Recv
kw.doc: Receive the message from the Websocket server.

kw.name: Recv
kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = Now, send a word to the server to know the number of vowels in it

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = Now, send a word to the server to know the number of vowels in it

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.
kw.msg: ${receive results converted to string} = Now, send a word to the server to know the number of vowels in it

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${receive results converted to string} = Now, send a word to the server to know the number of vowels in it

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Recv
kw.doc: Receive the message from the Websocket server.

kw.name: Recv
kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = Number of vowels in the word all is well are 3

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = Number of vowels in the word all is well are 3

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.
kw.msg: ${receive results converted to string} = Number of vowels in the word all is well are 3

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${receive results converted to string} = Number of vowels in the word all is well are 3

kw.name: KW: WebSocket BulitIn Response Assertion
kw.doc: Close the websocket server With Reason.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Close
kw.doc: Close the opened WebSocket session to a server.

test.name: TC2: WS Connect to null reserve keyword and validate the reply from the socket server.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Connect
kw.doc: Create a WebSocket session to a server. With an alias, where Robot Framework alias is to identify the session. Ex: wss://ws.postman-echo.com/raw header=["User-Agent: MyProgram","x-custom: header"]

kw.name: Connect
kw.msg: ${websocket session_name} = <websocket._core.WebSocket object at 0x10f511210>

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${websocket session_name} = <websocket._core.WebSocket object at 0x10f511210>

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Recv
kw.doc: Receive the message from the Websocket server.

kw.name: Recv
kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = {"Error":"Query parameter not found","Description":"A query parameter with 'name' as key and your name as value is a required for connecting to this WebSocket Server"}

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = {"Error":"Query parameter not found","Description":"A query parameter with 'name' as key and your name as value is a required for connecting to this WebSocket Server"}

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${receive results converted to string} = {"Error":"Query parameter not found","Description":"A query parameter with 'name' as key and your name as value is a required for connecting to this WebSocket Server"}

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.arg: KW: Store response, convert to json & string and then get value from json.
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: Store response, convert to json & string and then get value from json.
kw.doc: Get specific KEY:Value from Json

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.
kw.msg: ${json content} = {"Error":"Query parameter not found","Description":"A query parameter with 'name' as key and your name as value is a required for connecting to this WebSocket Server"}

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${json content} = {"Error":"Query parameter not found","Description":"A query parameter with 'name' as key and your name as value is a required for connecting to this WebSocket Server"}

kw.name: Convert String To Json
kw.doc: Convert String to JSON object
kw.msg: ${json} = {'Error': 'Query parameter not found', 'Description': "A query parameter with 'name' as key and your name as value is a required for connecting to this WebSocket Server"}

kw.name: Get Value From Json
kw.doc: Get Value From JSON using JSONPath
kw.msg: ${json values} = ['Query parameter not found']

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${json values} = ['Query parameter not found']

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.
kw.msg: ${value from the list} = Query parameter not found

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.
kw.msg: ${list value} = Query parameter not found

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${list value} = Query parameter not found

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.doc: Convert String to JSON object

suite.doc: This robot file will execute only the raw cases with query parameters.

suite.name: Test3 Echo Header

kw.name: KW: Environment Specific
kw.doc: Condition where all host are stored in one place based on the env it will get executed.

kw.name: Run Keyword
kw.doc: Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: KW: UAT host url's
kw.doc: UAT environment host urls.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
kw.msg: ${ws host url} = wss://ws.postman-echo.com

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
kw.msg: ${api host url} = https://postman-echo.com

kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${api host url} = https://postman-echo.com

kw.name: Run Keyword
kw.doc: Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Exception! the current environment "${environment}" is not functionable.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Finally! the current environment "${environment}" is functionable.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: Finally! the current environment "uat" is functionable.

test.name: TC1: WS Connect with valid header, assert the reply and close the socket.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
kw.msg: ${ws header dic} = {'email': 'rajeev@hotmail.com'}

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Connect
kw.doc: Create a WebSocket session to a server. With an alias, where Robot Framework alias is to identify the session. Ex: wss://ws.postman-echo.com/raw header=["User-Agent: MyProgram","x-custom: header"]

kw.name: Connect
kw.msg: ${websocket session_name} = <websocket._core.WebSocket object at 0x10f546d90>

kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = Configuration Successful!! Server has started 🎉🎉🎉🎉

kw.name: Recv
kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = Now, send a word to the server to know the number of consonants in it

kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = Now, send a word to the server to know the number of consonants in it

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Send
kw.doc: Send the message from the Websocket server.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Recv
kw.doc: Receive the message from the Websocket server.

kw.name: Recv
kw.msg: ${websocket receive results} = Number of consonants in all is well are 8

kw.name: Set Global Variable

kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.arg: Number of consonants in all is well are 8
kw.doc: Close the websocket server With Reason.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Close
kw.doc: Close the opened WebSocket session to a server.

test.doc: This TC is to Connect with header, assert the reply and close the socket.

test.name: TC2: WS Connect without header, assert the reply and close the socket.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Connect
kw.doc: Create a WebSocket session to a server. With an alias, where Robot Framework alias is to identify the session. Ex: wss://ws.postman-echo.com/raw header=["User-Agent: MyProgram","x-custom: header"]

kw.name: Connect
kw.msg: ${websocket session_name} = <websocket._core.WebSocket object at 0x10f586350>

suite.name: Test4 Echo Json

kw.name: KW: Environment Specific
kw.doc: Condition where all host are stored in one place based on the env it will get executed.

kw.name: Run Keyword
kw.doc: Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: KW: UAT host url's
kw.doc: UAT environment host urls.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
kw.msg: ${ws host url} = wss://ws.postman-echo.com

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
kw.msg: ${api host url} = https://postman-echo.com

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${ws host url} = wss://ws.postman-echo.com

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${api host url} = https://postman-echo.com

kw.name: Run Keyword
kw.doc: Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Exception! the current environment "${environment}" is not functionable.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Finally! the current environment "${environment}" is functionable.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: Finally! the current environment "uat" is functionable.

test.name: TC1: WS Connect, send with valid json, assert the reply and close the socket.

kw.name: Convert String To Json
kw.doc: Convert String to JSON object
kw.msg: ${ws json object} = {'orders': [{'name': 'Rajeev'}, {'email': 'rajeev@hotmail.com'}, {'id': 99}]}

kw.name: Convert Json To String
kw.doc: Convert JSON object to string
kw.msg: ${ws json object stringify} = {"orders": [{"name": "Rajeev"}, {"email": "rajeev@hotmail.com"}, {"id": 99}]}

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.msg: ${receive results converted to string} = {"Error":"Invalid JSON found","Description":"The message sent is not in proper JSON format, please try again. "}

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.arg: KW: Store response, convert to json & string and then get value from json.
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: Store response, convert to json & string and then get value from json.
kw.doc: Get specific KEY:Value from Json

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.
kw.msg: ${json content} = {"Error":"Invalid JSON found","Description":"The message sent is not in proper JSON format, please try again. "}

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${json content} = {"Error":"Invalid JSON found","Description":"The message sent is not in proper JSON format, please try again. "}

kw.name: Convert String To Json
kw.doc: Convert String to JSON object
kw.msg: ${json} = {'Error': 'Invalid JSON found', 'Description': 'The message sent is not in proper JSON format, please try again. '}

kw.name: Get Value From Json
kw.doc: Get Value From JSON using JSONPath
kw.msg: ${json values} = ['Invalid JSON found']

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${json values} = ['Invalid JSON found']

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.
kw.msg: ${value from the list} = Invalid JSON found

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.
kw.msg: ${list value} = Invalid JSON found

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${list value} = Invalid JSON found

test.name: TC1: WS Connect with events to randomize from 0-1, v4, handshake path to random assert the reply and close the socket.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: WebSocketClient Connect
kw.doc: Create a WebSocket session to a server. With an alias, where Robot Framework alias is to identify the session. Ex: wss://ws.postman-echo.com/raw header=["User-Agent: MyProgram","x-custom: header"]

kw.name: Connect
kw.msg:
WebSocketBadStatusException: Handshake status 502 Bad Gateway -+-+- {'date': 'Thu, 19 Oct 2023 17:27:15 GMT', 'content-type': 'text/html', 'content-length': '150', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'server': 'nginx'} -+-+- b' 502 Bad Gateway

502 Bad Gateway

nginx
'

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

test.doc: This TC is to Connect, send with valid json, assert the reply and close the socket.
test.status:
Several failures occurred: 1) WebSocketBadStatusException: Handshake status 502 Bad Gateway -+-+- {'date': 'Thu, 19 Oct 2023 17:27:15 GMT', 'content-type': 'text/html', 'content-length': '150', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'server': 'nginx'} -+-+- b' 502 Bad Gateway

502 Bad Gateway

nginx
' 2) Execution terminated by signal

suite.doc: This robot file will execute only the raw cases with json.
